question:
Which of the following best describes a way to safely transmit Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI)?
(CONTROLLED UNCLASSIFIED INFORMATION)
canonical_answer: Paul verifies that the information is CUI, includes a CUI marking in the subject header, and digitally signs an e-mail containing CUI.
